name: 生物多样性
subject: biology
domain_name: 生态与生物多样性 / Ecology & Biodiversity / Ecology & Biodiversity
curriculum_points: HS-LS2-2: Use mathematical representations to support and revise explanations based on evidence about factors affecting biodiversity and populations in ecosystems of different scales.
HS-LS2-7: Design, evaluate, and refine a solution for reducing the impacts of human activities on the environment and biodiversity.
HS-LS4-6: Create or revise a simulation to test a solution to mitigate adverse impacts of human activity on biodiversity.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「生物多样性」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-LS2-2: Use mathematical representations to support and revise explanations based on evidence about factors affecting …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-LS2-7: Design, evaluate, and refine a solution for reducing the impacts of hu… 对理解「生物多样性」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
